objective: Allow bounded Quantum State Objects to access QSO-SEEKER evidence through capability-scoped Digital Consciousness Field views.
phases: Define local copies of versioned field contracts and hashes.
Implement a read-only field client with no publisher or network authority.
Validate every envelope, record, capability, scope, retention, and provenance link.
Expose evidence as untrusted observations rather than executable instructions.
Integrate access logs and acknowledgements with freeze points and experiment provenance.
Run cross-repository compatibility tests before enabling any non-fixture source.
